title: Ubiquiti UA-G2-SK-Pro - UniFi Access G2 Starter kit professional
description: UniFi Access G2 Starter Kit professional is a professional basic set of components to install the UniFi Access access system . The set is compatible with most electric locks, magnetic locks and a whole range of 12V accessories such as motion sensors, buttons and alarms. The installation of the entire ecosystem is very fast, easy and offers simple management of users , visitors, plans and levels or access permissions via UniFi Access Controller. The set is powered via PoE, which is not included… Sample connection diagram with G2 professional starter kit UniFi Access controller management - management of users / roles / permissions / statistics Note: UniFi Dream Machine Pro is required to operate UniFi Access (1) UniFi Access Door Hub (hub / controller) (1) UniFi Access Reader G2 Professional (reader + display) (1) UniFi Access Reader G2 (reader) (2) UniFi Access Pocket Keyfob (access key) GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
